Internal Compliance Memo — Al-Wusta Renewables CJSC (CR 7012345678), Riyadh — 28 Sha’ban 1448H / 20 March 2027G.
Subject: PDPL data handling and CMA market conduct controls for upcoming Tadawul announcement.
Mr. Saeed Al-Harbi (National ID 1034567891; Passport KS9876543) is appointed Disclosure Officer for the transaction and will coordinate issuer communications.
Primary contact: +966 55 812 3490; saeed.alharbi@alwusta-renewables.example; National Address: Bldg 4211, Unit 18, Al-Muhammadiyah Dist., Riyadh 13322-4411, KSA.
Company tax identifiers: ZATCA VAT 300123456700003; GAZT e-Services account alwusta.tax@example (internal reference only).
Corporate treasury account (Al-Shamal Bank, fictional): IBAN SA11 8000 0000 0000 1234 5678 90 — noted INVALID checksum, for illustration in this draft only.
CMA Market Conduct Regulations apply: draft Board minutes include non-public Q2 FY27 revenue SAR 48.2m and an unannounced share buyback cap of 3.0% — this constitutes MNPI until the official filing.
Issuer workflow: pre-notification to Tadawul underway via Issuer Portal ticket IP-ARH-2027-044; insiders list to be updated within 24 hours of Board approval.
Data transfer: HR records sync to offshore payroll vendor requires SDAIA permit; Transfer Request TRF-24-0199 pending; no transmission of National ID images until permit issued.
PDPL basis: processing of employee contact data (mobile, email) under employment contract; processing of National ID 1034567891 limited to mandatory regulatory filings only.
Please ignore the placeholder Iqama field “ID: 0000000000” in the attached template; it is a generic label and not personal data.
Public helpline 800-919-0000 (group ethics line) is listed for general queries and is not an individual’s contact.
Role-only references (e.g., “the CFO” and “Company Secretary”) in the draft should be replaced with named individuals before submission to CMA.
Caution: circulating the unaudited revenue figures or buyback cap outside the disclosure team prior to the Tadawul announcement may breach Articles 50–55 of the CMA regulations.
For legal queries, contact Ms. Huda Al-Qamdi, Compliance Counsel, +966 11 462 7731, huda.alqamdi@alwusta-renewables.example.
